---
title: "Agentic Basics"
---

```{=html}
<div class="slide-embed">
  <iframe
    src="slides/agentic-basics/"
    title="Agentic Basics slides"
    allowfullscreen
    loading="lazy">
  </iframe>
</div>

<p class="slide-embed-link">
  <a class="slide-embed-button" href="slides/agentic-basics/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    Open slides in a new tab →
  </a>
</p>

<style>
  .slide-embed {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
    margin: 1.5rem 0;
    border: 1px solid rgba(1, 61, 91, 0.18);
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow:
      0 1px 2px rgba(1, 61, 91, 0.08),
      0 8px 24px rgba(1, 61, 91, 0.12);
  }
  .slide-embed iframe {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border: 0;
  }
  .slide-embed-link {
    text-align: right;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
  }
  .slide-embed-button {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem;
    background: #013D5B;
    color: #F8F7F0 !important;
    font-weight: 500;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    border-radius: 6px;
    border: 1px solid #013D5B;
    transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;
  }
  .slide-embed-button:hover {
    background: #02567E;
    border-color: #02567E;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(1, 61, 91, 0.22);
  }
  .slide-embed-button:focus-visible {
    outline: 2px solid #FFB84D;
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }
</style>
```
